channel.title: Hourly Kabir Das Dohas
channel.description: Timeless wisdom by Sant Kabir Das

item.title: बुरा जो देखन मैं चला, बुरा न मिलिया कोय । जो दिल खोजा आपना, मुझसे बुरा न कोय ॥
item.description:
Meaning: I searched the world for bad people but found none. When I looked inside my own heart, I realized I am the worst of all.

Translation: I went searching for the wicked, but found no one. When I searched my own heart, I found no one worse than me.
item.guid: बुरा जो देखन मैं चला, बुरा न मिलिया कोय । जो दिल खोजा आपना, मुझसे बुरा न कोय ॥493021

item.title: दुख में सुमिरन सब करे, सुख में करै न कोय । जो सुख में सुमिरन करे, दुख काहे को होय ॥
item.description:
Meaning: Everyone remembers God in sorrow, no one remembers in joy. If one remembers God in joy, why would sorrow ever come?

Translation: In sorrow everyone remembers Him, in joy no one does. If one remembers Him in joy, why would sorrow come?
item.guid: दुख में सुमिरन सब करे, सुख में करै न कोय । जो सुख में सुमिरन करे, दुख काहे को होय ॥493022

item.title: गुरु गोविंद दोऊ खड़े, काके लागूं पाँय । बलिहारी गुरु आपने, गोविंद दियो बताय ॥
item.description:
Meaning: Both Guru and God are standing before me, whose feet should I touch first? I bow to my Guru.

Translation: Guru and God both are standing, whose feet should I touch? I surrender to my Guru who introduced me to God.
item.guid: गुरु गोविंद दोऊ खड़े, काके लागूं पाँय । बलिहारी गुरु आपने, गोविंद दियो बताय ॥493023
